description.ko: 파열된 신호 리본의 단색 격자가 빠른 디지털 혼돈을 엄격한 기하 질서 안에 붙잡는다.
description.en: A monochrome lattice of fractured signal ribbons holds fast digital chaos inside strict geometric order.

prompt: KURO-X artwork titled "Parallax Error Loom": a pure black and white geometric abstraction with no character, logo, sculpture, or central object, formed as a tilted field of interwoven angular signal ribbons. Matte #1A1A1A trapezoid bands, hard #FFFFFF void cuts, and layered #808080 / #C0C0C0 facets lock into a precise but unstable lattice, like fragmented data being woven at impossible speed. The composition is driven by fast diagonal shear: rows of serrated triangles, broken diamonds, offset parallelograms, and thin sliver-like polygons snap out of alignment while still preserving perfect visual balance. Dense horizontal scanlines, interlaced glitch tearing, bit-crushed compression blocks, stepped waveform edges, and medium-density square particle debris create intense monochrome complexity. High contrast, crisp vector edges, sharp angles, cold mechanical depth, chaotic fragments held inside an invisible mathematical order.
